settings.title: HOW MUCH ARE YOUR PRODUCTS?
settings.text: The prices of our products vary. The basis of the price setting is dependent on a price table. You may request an estimation.

settings.title: DO YOU OFFER CUSTOMISATION ON YOUR PRODUCTS?
settings.text: Yes. We do offer customisation on CERTAIN products.

settings.title: HOW LONG IS THE LEAD TIME?
settings.text: The lead time varies per product. If product is on-hand, 1 month. If it is indent, 3-6 months.
